recommendations.title: Chicken Run: Dawn of the Nugget
recommendations.overview: A band of fearless chickens flock together to save poultry-kind from an unsettling new threat: a nearby farm that's cooking up something suspicious.

recommendations.title: Diary of a Wimpy Kid: The Long Haul
recommendations.overview: A Heffley family road trip to attend Meemaw's 90th birthday party goes hilariously off course thanks to Greg's newest scheme to get to a video gaming convention.

recommendations.title: The Boss Baby: Family Business

recommendations.title: Madagascar
recommendations.overview: Four animal friends get a taste of the wild life when they break out of captivity at the Central Park Zoo and wash ashore on the island of Madagascar.

recommendations.title: Megamind
recommendations.genres: Animation, Action, Comedy, Family, Science Fiction
recommendations.overview: After Megamind, a highly intelligent alien supervillain, defeats his long-time nemesis Metro Man, Megamind creates a new hero to fight, but must act to save the city when his "creation" becomes an even worse villain than he was.
